name: Turkey Patties in Mushroom Wine Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large frying pan, sauté half the mushrooms and chopped onion in margarine until tender.
2. Combine the sautéed vegetables with ground turkey, egg, salt, and herbs. Mix well.
3. Shape the mixture into 4 patties.
4. Heat a skillet over medium-low heat. Place the patties on one side of the pan and add the remaining mushrooms, wine, and pepper to the same pan.
5. Gently simmer the sauce until it coats the back of a spoon, about 2-3 minutes.
6. Serve the sauce over the patties.
4 Servings
1 Serving: 1 Patty
with Sauce Nutritive values per serving: 3 gm. carbohydrates; 23 gm. protein; 13 gm. fat; 0.5 gm. fiber; 359 mg. sodium; 89 mg. cholesterol Food Exchanges per serving: 3 1/2 Lean Meat Exchanges Low-sodium diets: Omit salt. Use unsalted margarine. Note: If you have a high cholesterol count, substitute EggBeaters for the egg.
